    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BookTickets
    Ticket booking interface with multi-step flow.
    BrowseMoviesUI
    UI for browsing available movies in the theater.
    CreateNewAcc
    UI for creating a new user account.
    CustomerServiceUI
    UI for customer service support requests.
    FoodOrderUI
    UI for ordering food and beverages at the theater.
    HomeScreen
    Home screen after login, provides navigation to all system features.
    LoginWrongInfoException
    Exception thrown when login credentials are invalid.
    Main
    Main entry point for the theater booking application.
    MainMenu
    Main login menu for the theater booking system.
    MovieAPI
    API client for OMDb movie database.
    MovieCRUD
    CRUD operations for the Movie table in the theater database.
    MyTicketsUI
    This class represents the UI for displaying a user's booked tickets.
    ProfileUI
    User profile management interface.
    PurchaseCRUD
    CRUD operations for the Purchase table in the theater database.
    ReviewCRUD
    CRUD operations for the Review table in the theater database.
    ReviewUI
    UI for submitting and viewing movie reviews.
    Run
    Alternative entry point to launch the application.
    ScreeningCRUD
    CRUD operations for the Screening table in the theater database.
    SeatCRUD
    CRUD operations for the Seat table in the theater database.
    TicketCRUD
    CRUD operations for the Ticket table in the theater database.
    UserCRUD
    CRUD operations for the User table in the theater database.
    verifier
    Validates user credentials for login.
